task_completion.description: Verify that the OpenToonz application is open and the 'dwanko_run.tnz' scene is loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz interface is visible, and the scene name 'dwanko_run' is displayed in the title bar, xsheet, or scene browser.

task_completion.description: Verify that the character's skin color has been changed to Dark Blue-Grey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenToonz viewer, the character's skin appears dark blue-grey. The Style Editor may show RGB values close to 60, 60, 90 for the skin palette style.

task_completion.description: Verify that the character's shirt color has been changed to Dark Purple/Indigo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenToonz viewer, the character's shirt appears dark purple/indigo. The Style Editor may show RGB values close to 40, 30, 60 for the shirt palette style.

task_completion.description: Verify that the character's line art remains black.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenToonz viewer, the outlines of the character are black, not recolored.

task_completion.description: Verify that the output settings are configured to render a PNG sequence to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Output Settings' window in OpenToonz shows the 'Save In' path set to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/night_scene/' and the file format set to 'png'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the animation is rendered to the output directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A rendering progress bar is shown in OpenToonz, or a file manager/terminal window displays newly created PNG files in '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/night_scene/'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the OpenToonz GUI to perform the recoloring and rendering.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with OpenToonz menus, Palette, Style Editor, and Output Settings, rather than terminal commands modifying project files.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use external scripts to generate the output frames.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal or text editor is not used to run Python or shell scripts that bypass OpenToonz's rendering engine.

integrity.description: Verify that the rendered frames are genuinely produced from the modified scene.
integrity.visual_evidence: The output frames match the recolored character seen in the OpenToonz viewer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The scene path is '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz'. The output directory must be exactly '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/night_scene/'. The target skin color is RGB [60, 60, 90] and the target shirt color is RGB [40, 30, 60]. The VLM should verify these RGB values in the OpenToonz Style Editor or visually estimate the dark blue-grey skin and dark purple/indigo shirt. The line art must remain black.
